steps.title: Identify the explicit statement about the collection
steps.content: The passage directly states the museum “has more than 4,800 objects in its collection.” This is a clear factual claim in the text.

steps.title: Match the statement to the choices
steps.content: Only choice C can be directly verified from the text. The other options either contradict explicit facts (B claims founded after 2000, but the text says 1991; D claims no longer in Denver, but the text states it is located there) or introduce unsupported claims (A on visitor comparisons). That matches choice C — C is correct.
